reviews.review_description: I am new and enjoying playing VR lawn bowls. Please, when will it become a multiplayer game.

Really enjoying playing bowls in VR. I've been waiting for a dev to do bowls and this one has made a great start. For the price it really is a bargain. 

The physics are very good and I Iove judging the bias of each bowl. You can play lots of diff games and change things to suit you ie level of bias, speed of surface, length of rink, level of AI, camera zoom etc. I love having the option to follow each bowl down the rink or just watch it on the screen. It's also a great game for seated play if you want. A few touch ups and multiplayer will make this even better.
